title: UPI OC No 115 E FY 2024 25 Addendum to circular on the Numeric UPI ID resolution
text:
NEE)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA
NPCI/UPI/OC-115E/2024-25 3 March 2025

To,

UP! Member Banks, PSPs, and Third-Party App Providers

Subject: Addendum to circular NPCI/UPI/OC-115/2021-22 on the Numeric UPI ID resolution

This has reference to UPi OC NPCI/UPI/OC-115/2021-2022 dated 20th July 2021 on ‘Rollout of “Numeric
UPI ID Mapper’ to enable “UPI Number’, UPI Steering Committee Meeting held on 16" July 2024 and multiple
Working Group discussions for UP] Number aimed at enhancing interoperability and user convenience in UPI

number-based UPI payments.

Following are the additional guidelines for UP] Number:

1. The Banks, PSP App shall use the Mobile Number Revocation List/Digital Intelligence Platform
(MNRL/DIP) and update their database accordingly at regular intervals, at least on weekly basis. The
activity of recycled or the churned mobile numbers reflecting correctly in the bank and PSP/TPAP
databases will reduce the chances of errors due to churned mobile numbers.

2. UPI App shall obtain explicit user consent with clear opt-out option (by default checked out, and user
needs to click on opt-in) for seeding or porting UPI Number.

a) UPI App shall ensure clear, non-intrusive communication without misleading/forceful
messaging. Consent shail not be taken before or during a transaction in any condition.

b) Seeding or porting communications of UPI number shall exclude miscommunication
(For example - the user will stop receiving the money using UPI without taking an action

on seeding the number in mapper)

In case of NPCI mapper response time is not as per requirements, then the PSP app can resolve the
number locally, subject to the PSP App report such occurrences on monthly basis to NPCI as listed in

Annexure A

All members are advised to comply before 31% March 2025.
Yours sincerely,

SD/-
Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Products

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10" Floor,
Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051.
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
rr
Together Wy a contact@npci.org.in www.npci.org.in
WeBuild CIN: U74990MH2008NPL189067

X)


NEP

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

Annexure A

Monthly Mapper data to be shared in below format:

Count | Handle wise Count

Total Seeding Count

Active Unique Users on Mapper for the month

Total (CMID) transactions count for the month

Total UPI Number based transactions resolved locally for the month

Mode of Success transaction _| Total count of transaction where resolution >1 sec
Payments Count |
UPI No | [ |

UPIID | [ |

Churned UPI no. count deregistered from UPI mapper
No. of deregistered profile (including UP! Number) based on customer action |

Requested data shall be provided by PSP/UPI App with NPCI as per the above-mentioned framework
from 1* April 2025 onwards. Additionally, respective raw data shall also be shared with NPCI.

Together >
WeBuid wae
